channel.title: defluenced on Unkle Bonehead
channel.description: Recent content in defluenced on Unkle Bonehead

item.title: An Interview with Us S1ep01
item.author: unklebonehead@murena.io (Unkle Bonehead)
item.description: People get banned from social media. Because they dont tow the line and big tech answers to no one. They are in control. Whether it’s left or right. If the platform has a TOS that states they can delete your account. Then you should expect it to happen at any time for any reason. Those kinds of terms means you are only ok with the current operators of the service. Until you do or say something that reflects bad on their real customers, the advertisers. Because you know they cant sell bad product (you)  to their customers. Watch on CastGarden
